our_open_deliverables.text: Propose short POC scope and timeline
Send management-level outreach email from the deal owner's manager to Frederic Hamelin and Franz Pinto requesting on-site meeting
Send documentation library link and associated videos to Ubisoft participants (Gabriel Hide, Corentin Sebe)
Propose short POC scope and timeline to Ubisoft.
Offer Business Cases, customer testimonials and ROI construction to support Ubisoft's internal alignment
Send Ubisoft the documentation library link and associated videos.

buyer_dependent_items.text: Schedule and confirm technical meeting on integration/implementation (early July TBC)
Provide feedback on shortlist and next steps (Ubisoft RFP timeline: July 2026)
Confirm preferred vendor status to trigger SoW workshop (mid-July)
Provide Ubisoft feedback on shortlisted vendors and next steps (per RFP timeline: July 2026)
Finalise internal alignment, then schedule the technical/integration meeting.
Provide shortlist/preferred-vendor feedback per RFP timeline.

competitive_position.summary: Zycus is shortlisted (3-4 vendors) and was invited before shortlist finalized, signaling product-level preference on intake capability. Competing against 1-2 unnamed external S2P vendors plus internal tools (ExAchat, Evalua). No competitive intel (no champion). RFP is intake-centric, favoring Zycus. Wedge: Merlin AI + intake automation depth. Risk: blind to competitors' positioning.

champion_strength.source: Next_Step__c 15 Jun, 04 Jun, 21 May 2026: 'Still no champion', 'Need to find a champion', 'Still missing a champion'
champion_strength.summary: No champion. Frederic Hamelin (HQ Procurement Director) is engaged and developing (accepted LinkedIn, confirmed internal alignment delay is routine) but not yet advocating for Zycus or providing competitive intel. Gabriel Hide and Corentin Sebe engaged operationally but not advocating. EB Franz Pinto and DM Anne-Sophie Dupont unengaged. Without a champion, Zycus is blind to 1-2 unnamed shortlist competitors and cannot navigate post-shortlist politics.

sources: Contact Role: Franz Pinto, Group Procurement Director
Next_Step__c 04 Jun 2026: 'We will meet for the first time DM and EM during this presentation (Frédéric Hamelin and/or Franz Pinto / He accepted my contact request on Linkedin)'
Next_Step__c 15 Jun 2026: 'Linkedin connection request accepted by Frédéric Hamelin (one of the DM) not by Franz Pinto (EB) - Still no champion'
Next_Step__c 24 Jun 2026: 'Frédéric Hamelin (DM direct report of EB Franz Pinto) confirmed via mail that it is really only an internal alignment we do not have to be worried'
meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: Franz Pinto (Group Procurement Director / Directeur des Achats Groupe) is identified as the Economic Buyer via Contact Role and Next_Step__c references (15 Jun, 04 Jun). He attended the 10 Jun oral defense (first appearance per Next_Step__c 04 Jun: 'We will meet for the first time DM and EM during this presentation (Frédéric Hamelin and/or Franz Pinto)'), but there has been no 1:1 engagement, no commercial or pricing conversation, and his LinkedIn connection request was not accepted (Next_Step__c 15 Jun: 'Linkedin connection request accepted by Frédéric Hamelin (one of the DM) not by Franz Pinto (EB) - Still no champion'). Franz is passive: present at the group defense but not driving the process or engaging directly with the relevant stakeholder_Step__c 24 Jun notes that Frederic Hamelin (HQ Procurement Director, DM direct report of EB Franz Pinto per Next_Step__c) confirmed via email that internal alignment delay is routine, but this is a second-hand read, not Franz speaking. Without direct EB engagement before commercials, budget authority and pricing approval are at risk. The EB must be brought into a 1:1 commercial conversation before the SoW workshop.

recommended_moves: Deliver the overdue POC proposal (scope, timeline, success criteria) to Ubisoft to confirm preferred-vendor status and trigger the SoW workshop mid-July. Proposal must address integration validation (PeopleSoft, Oracle ERP, Docusign, external compliance tool) and deployment model (centralized vs decentralized, offshore readiness). This is the immediate blocker to progression.

Secure a champion by converting Frederic Hamelin (HQ Procurement Director) from engaged influencer to active coach. Schedule a 1:1 call with Frederic to request competitive intel on the 1-2 unnamed shortlist peers, understand Ubisoft's internal decision dynamics, and ask him to advocate for Zycus internally. Offer to share proof points (customer testimonials, ROI case studies) he can use to build the internal case for Zycus.

Engage EB Franz Pinto (Group Procurement Director) in a 1:1 commercial conversation before the technical meeting early July. The deal owner's manager should initiate outreach (management-level per Next_Step__c 15 Jun) to discuss budget authority, pricing expectations, and ROI justification. Goal: validate budget and secure EB sponsorship before commercials begin.
